name: AERmon.ccnSouth30
title: Cloud Condensation Nuclei Concentration at Liquid Cloud Top
processing note:
CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:area: time: mean CMIP7:area: time: mean where convective\_cloud (mean over the portion of the cell containing liquid topped cloud, as seen from top of atmosphere),
This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of AERmon.ccnSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
